case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO., vs. JACK, FRANCIS N. et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $642.86 AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, FRANCIS N. JACK, RITA M.
